parameters: Wait! We dont need to look at that
Theres nothing of interest here I swear!
Oh for the love of- FINE
Its full of various bakers outfits, smells of flour?
Mom would kill me if I went back to sleep now,
I should get to work downstairs
Mom would kill me if I went back to sleep now,
I should get to work downstairs

I should get to work downstairs
Mom would kill me if I went back to sleep now,
I should get to work downstairs
Wait! We dont need to look at that
Theres nothing of interest here I swear!
Oh for the love of- FINE
This is moms Room, I shouldn't go in...
I used to have a sourdough starter in here...
Until i left it by the window...
Mom’s never let me have another since...
Oh crap! I overslept! Mom’s going to be-
Dammit Peter! I told you we needed you
downstairs to prep the dough ages ago!
Sorry Mom! I’ll get right on it!
Hurry up then, I need to run front of house.
I know you volunteered to work in the back...
but I need you to be reliable if you want me
And here I am sleeping in
after saying I'd handle baking today...
I should hurry and get to work.
A good chef always washes his hands!
